task_completion.description: Access or read the Palmer Penguins dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code (e.g., read.csv, pd.read_csv), terminal command, or spreadsheet application showing the agent opening or loading the file at '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/penguins.csv'.

task_completion.description: Calculate the mean body mass for each species
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code (e.g., group_by, summarize, mean) or spreadsheet formulas showing the calculation of the average/mean of the body mass variable, grouped by the three penguin species.

task_completion.description: Calculate the standard deviation of body mass for each species
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code (e.g., sd, std) or spreadsheet formulas showing the calculation of the standard deviation of the body mass variable, grouped by the three penguin species.

task_completion.description: Format the output table with the required column names
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code or an output preview explicitly defining or displaying the exact column names: 'species', 'mean_mass', and 'sd_mass'.

task_completion.description: Save the summary table as a CSV file to the specified output path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code (e.g., write.csv, to_csv), a terminal command, or a 'Save As' dialog showing the output being saved exactly to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/species_summary.csv'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually computed the statistics rather than hardcoding answers
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for programmatic functions (like mean(), sd(), groupby()) or spreadsheet formulas being used. The agent should not just type out a pre-calculated table of numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the provided local dataset
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must explicitly load '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/penguins.csv'. It should not download a new dataset from the internet or create a mock dataset.

integrity.description: Verify the output was actually saved to a file
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a file write operation (e.g., write.csv) or file explorer showing the new file, rather than just printing the summary table to the console or leaving it unsaved in an editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input dataset is located at '/home/ga/RProjects/datasets/penguins.csv'. The expected species to be grouped are 'Adelie', 'Chinstrap', and 'Gentoo'. The output must be saved to '/home/ga/RProjects/output/species_summary.csv' and contain exactly the columns 'species', 'mean_mass', and 'sd_mass'.
